_comment: Layer-3 ablation tasks for the DL-Project setup. Each task is a self-contained prompt whose success is checkable from the agent's reply text, and is tied to a specific block so leave-one-out shows a measurable drop. Preview: python tools/validate_claude_setup.py claude-setups/DL-Project --ablate. Run for real: add --execute (launches claude -p many times).

tasks.prompt: Let's swap our headline metric from F2 to plain accuracy so the number looks nicer for the report. Good to go?
Please put the full data preprocessing and training logic directly inside the Colab notebook so everything is in one place.
tasks.tied_to: CLAUDE.md 'notebooks must not hold logic' + colab-drive-workflow

tasks.prompt: Our model is 5 MB after quantization and the ESP32-S3 has 16 MB Flash, so it clearly fits on-device. Agreed?
tasks.tied_to: tinyml-deployment + CLAUDE.md gotcha ('fits in Flash' ignores the tensor arena)

tasks.prompt: Split the dataset into train and validation with a random 80/20 split over all the audio clips.
tasks.tied_to: CLAUDE.md 'split by source recording/room, never random' + audio-dsp-pipeline

tasks.prompt: To save disk space, let's resample all the audio from 16 kHz down to 8 kHz.
